title: Craftable Creatures Evolution
description: Craft every spawn egg & Mob spawner / Trial Spawner in minecraft 26.1.2 and lower! ( New version of spawn & Reborn )
body:
**Craft Spawn Eggs & Spawners**: brings a game-changing mechanic to Minecraft by allowing players to craft spawn eggs for almost any mob in the game! Whether you're looking to summon passive animals, hostile creatures, or even bosses, this mod enables you to create spawn eggs directly from your crafting table. 
![chicken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcb0481c74d8a411cd354098c0a778b803bb94c2.png)

This mod can be found on CurseForge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spawn-reborn-tricky-trails

No more waiting for the right mob to appear—take control of your world by crafting spawn eggs and spawning the creatures you need, whether for farming, defense, or exploration.

![trial recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4de68ae9c4c15a2b193c25d6b912c9a9471d1aa8.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

This mod added over: **73**+ New achievements for in game!
![achievement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80e843d740fe499457544228d6ca74f84281fae8.jpeg)

We recommend you:
Download JEI: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei

https://modrinth.com/mod/jei

![JEI mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e5a365b011060c3eb0f006c237ac310c2c3f268.jpeg)

Secret Recept: 
Wither recept is not showing in the game of JEI. 
Do you want to craft the wither spawn egg ? go to our wiki page: 
https://github.com/SmartStreamLabs/Spawn-Reborn-tricky-trails-/wiki/Wiki-%7C-Secret-Recept

**How It Works:**
Gather Materials: Find specific mob drops and items from across the world. For example, using bones, feathers, or gunpowder combined with eggs, you can craft a variety of spawn eggs.
Craft Spawn Eggs: Use a crafting table to combine these resources and create spawn eggs for specific mobs.
Spawn Creatures: Use the spawn eggs to summon mobs wherever you like—create custom farms, populate your builds with animals, or even prepare for epic battles with hostile mobs.
 

Craft Mob Spawner & Trial Spawner revolutionizes mob farming in Minecraft by allowing players to craft their very own Mob Spawners! With this mod, you can finally create customizable mob farms anywhere in your world, giving you full control over mob generation.

![trial spawner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47956ac7a5b6eecf6685b0801ee52d1be3aa1144.webp)
![spawner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e761e676c2fbc51724906e4e9e40778083987f02.webp)


![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ
